title: aloysia peruviana
intro: Aloysia peruviana, also known as the sweet-alder or beebrush plant, is a flowering plant in the mint family that is native to South America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aloysia peruviana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Aloysia peruviana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Natural product research", Aloysia peruviana (also known as Plinia peruviana) has antioxidant and anti-proliferative effects, demonstrating potential in treating human epithelial cervical cancer and human breast cancer.
